response.justification: Bogdan Szabo has strong general software engineering experience with diverse tech stacks, but his resume lacks direct evidence of JVM (Java/Kotlin) expertise, IDE tooling, or enterprise framework experience. While he demonstrates system design and collaboration skills, his focus appears more on web/mobile development, AI agents, and embedded systems rather than enterprise IDE development.
strengths: Demonstrated ability to work across full-stack technologies and complex systems
Strong open-source contributions and community engagement
Experience with developer tooling and automation (CI/CD, MCP, etc.)
concerns: No visible experience with Java/Kotlin or JVM internals
No mention of IDE development, language tooling, or enterprise frameworks like Spring
Most recent roles focus on web/mobile development rather than enterprise IDE tooling
